steps.title: Identify the grammar on each side
steps.content: The blank falls between “wildlife” (noun) and “is on the front lines...” (finite verb phrase). The blank supplies a title and proper name to complete the subject.

steps.title: Apply the title-name punctuation rule
steps.content: When a title precedes a proper name without an article, no punctuation should separate them. Choice C correctly omits punctuation. Options A and D incorrectly insert commas (appropriate only with an article like “the”); option B misuses a colon. That matches choice C — C is correct.
